name: kg-cui-vault-host
description: SCAFFOLD-ONLY productized host for the cui-data-vault-contract-profile schema. Implements requestAccess() API + libsodium-based tokenization, ships dockerfile + helm chart + OpenAPI spec. Aimed at DIB contractors needing a defense-grade vault that enforces the 3-axis CUI×ITAR×foreign-person policy at runtime. No public hosted instance — operator-deploy only.
